## Summary

- [ ] Linked issue (or `N/A`)
- [ ] Summary of changes
- [ ] Rationale/context

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix / patch
- [ ] New feature or theme improvement
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation / config only
- [ ] Refactor (no behavior change)

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] `npm run check:assets` passes
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm run lint:php` passes
- [ ] `npm run check:drift` passes
- [ ] Tested in WordPress environment
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated

## Screenshots (if applicable)

## Notes for Reviewers
